topic: How Drishvara should explain tariff setting and cost recovery in rural water services
objective: Show how tariff logic, operating cost recovery, accountability, and community communication can be explained in one structured narrative
facts: Tariff discussions often fail when cost recovery and service sustainability are explained separately.
Implementation stakeholders need a practical explanation of tariff logic, affordability, and accountability.
Narrative plus visual structure can make tariff-setting easier to communicate.
